inputs.idea: A shared claim board so parallel agents avoid editing the same files.
inputs.context: Teams running many agents in one repo hit merge collisions.

expected_outputs.value_assessment: Target user: teams running parallel agents. Pain: path collisions and lost work. Alternatives: ad-hoc locking, manual coordination. Novelty: contract-level claim board. Risks: adoption friction if claims feel heavy.

next_experiment.experiment: Run two agents on one repo with and without the claim board; measure collision rate.
next_experiment.success: collisions drop to near zero with low overhead

notes: Evaluates user value and differentiation and proposes a cheap validating experiment.
